summary: Updated canonical knowledge to remove old agency-loop terminology, make agency the canonical bounded automation term, and clarify that graph state owns derived queue order while roadmap owns work truth.
accepted_decisions_mapped: agency removed from live KB/source vocabulary
agency controller and agency cycles are canonical
roadmap owns work truth; graph owns derived queue order

validation_expectations.vertical: Accepted feedback decision is represented in KB docs, roadmap TASK-038, source naming, tests, and README/skills.
validation_expectations.horizontal: Agency, graph, roadmap, compilers, extension, and lexicon docs use compatible terminology and truth boundaries.
